race.description: Louise Moulton Mother's Day Super Maiden Plate
race.comment: Waller holds the aces, headed by CRUSADER VOYAGE (1) who comes here off a tiring fourth when tested over 1900m at Canterbury last start. Just missed two back over today's trip at Hawkesbury which is a better form reference. Very fit and bursting to win one after six minor placings. Stablemate PINK PERSUASION (13) has a similar profile with five placings from six outings. Battled on well to be beaten just over a length last time at Canterbury. Steps up sharply in trip which should suit as the dam is by Savabeel. Looks the obvious danger. Another Waller runner in KAWERAU (3) was looking for further when last of seven over 1250m at Canterbury recently. Lightly raced and deserves another chance in this more suitable race. VISION IN A DREAM (14) is the query runner first-up from a two-month let-up. Placed over the mile at her latest appearance. The betting will be crucial. NEFERUSOBEK (12) strips fitter and can fill a top four spot without surprising.
